case_title: ROBB FLEISCHER VS. XOXO ENTERTAINMENT, LLC.

docket_entries.description: TRIAL RESET TO JAN-23-2019 AT 10:00 AM IN DEPT 506 TRIAL OF NOV-20-2018 IS TAKEN OFF CALENDAR
(SC-150) REQUEST TO RESET TRIAL FILED BY PLAINTIFF FLEISCHER, ROBB
REMARK:FILE DESTROYED PER ORDER SIGNED BY JUDGE SAMUEL FENG ON 7/29/2022 PURSUANT TO GOVERNMENT CODE SECTION 681.53.
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $6,500.00 FILED BY FLEISCHER, ROBB AS TO DEFENDANT XOXO ENTERTAINMENT, LLC. ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR NOV-20-2018 AT 10:00 AM IN DEPT 506

THE COURT ORDERS DISMISSAL OF THE ENTIRE ACTION WITHOUT PREJUDICE. NO APPEARANCES BY PLAINTIFF. NO APPEARANCES BY DEFENDANT. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: A. JAMES ROBERTSON II; CLERK: R. SAHATJIAN; NOT REPORTED. (506)
ORDER CASE DISMISSED WITHOUT PREJUDICE. SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT FOR DETAILS.
